note: The official 2025-2026 Handbook publishes a 140-unit curriculum comprising 99 units of Major Courses, a separate 6-unit Honours Project, 9 units of University Language Courses, 22 units of General Education Courses and 4 units of Free Electives. This supplement records all 46 explicitly coded courses: 37 Major Required Courses totalling 90 units, seven courses across two closed Major Elective pools from which students complete 9 units, and both 3-unit Honours Project courses. For Major Electives, students take one 3-unit course from the first three-course pool and two 3-unit courses from the second four-course pool. The uncoded University Language, General Education and Free Elective components are excluded. The current School of Chinese Medicine Programme page independently confirms the four-year structure, 15-week practicum, Supervised Practicums I-III and Honours Project, but its untimed overview is not used to infer individual course timing. No Year or Term is assigned. The 2026-2027 Handbook endpoint returned HTTP 401 Basic Authentication on 2026-07-19, so this supplement remains explicitly scoped to 2025-2026 and must not be presented as the current 2026-2027 curriculum.
